blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
